steps.title: Focus on manufacturing scale
steps.content: The passage says conventional ETL fabrication can waste up to 80 percent of the nanoparticle solution, increasing manufacturing cost at scale. Spray coating is presented as a practical alternative that may avoid this problem. The inference should be about conventional fabrication being less suitable for large-scale production.

steps.title: Reject unsupported comparisons
steps.content: Choice B compares ETLs across different perovskite architectures, which the passage does not do. Choice C compares conventional fabrication with other established ETL methods, also unsupported. Choice D shifts from manufacturing cost to solar-power effectiveness. Only the scale problem follows from the described waste. The answer is A.
